purpose: Internal TellmeGen-style genetics coverage benchmark. This is not rendered to users; it prevents the skill pipeline from scoring highly when report-category breadth, WGS variant-class validation, or VCF interpretation readiness is incomplete.
source_notes: TellmeGen Ultra WGS public baseline advertises 30x whole-genome sequencing, 3 billion variants, 600+ reports, raw FASTQ/VCF downloads, and report blocks for genetic vulnerability, pharmacogenetics, hereditary conditions, traits, wellness, and ancestry.

This local benchmark converts that product shape into deterministic checks against interpretation catalogs, generated dashboard output, VCF-first WGS class handling, optional WGS caller manifests, and validation reports.

Raw-read callers are not required for the default product path because users are expected to provide WGS VCF/VCF.GZ or 23andMe-style SNP-array exports; callers are optional escalation for FASTQ/BAM/CRAM or incomplete vendor VCFs.
